title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">📅</font> Present (At Time of Text): 1960s
content:
📅 Present (At Time of Text): 1960s counterculture & skepticism toward authority.
📅 Modern Echo: The rise of deepfake technology and misinformation in media.
📅 Future Projection: AI-generated history replacing “real” history—how do we trust what we know?

✅ Why This Works:
• Demonstrates the evolution of storytelling and social anxieties over time.
• Forces students to see literature as part of a larger, ongoing cultural conversation.
• Ties into speculative thinking, encouraging creativity and engagement.

📜 4. Mastery Exam Redesign & Thematic Naming

✔ Now called “The Cognitive Stress Test”
✔ Students who pass all three levels with 100% can “Overthrow the Professor” (run a lecture).
✔ Difficulty Levels Named After Author Complexity
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 53 (chunk 53/555)
